name: top
description: 获取 Hacker News 当前最热门文章 (Top Stories). Returns a list of currently trending HN articles sorted by score. Each result includes title, url, points, comment count, and metadata. For filtering by content type, use the dedicated tools: ask (Q&A), show (project showcases), jobs (job postings), launch (product launches). For keyword search, use search.

limit.description: 返回文章数量，正整数，范围 1-500，默认 10

name: new
description: 获取 Hacker News 最新发布文章 (New Stories). Returns a list of newest HN submissions sorted by submission time. Results include title, url, points, comment count, and timestamp. For current trending stories, use top. For all-time best stories, use best.

limit.description: 返回文章数量，正整数，范围 1-500，默认 10

name: best
description: 获取 Hacker News 历史最佳文章 (Best Stories). Returns a list of all-time highest-rated HN articles sorted by score. Each result includes title, url, points, comment count, and metadata. For current trending stories, use top. For newest submissions, use new.

limit.description: 返回文章数量，正整数，范围 1-500，默认 10

name: ask
description: 获取 Hacker News 问答讨论 (Ask HN). Returns HN posts where users ask the community questions. Each result includes the question title, url, points, and comment count. For project showcases, use show. For job postings, use jobs. For product launches, use launch.

limit.description: 返回文章数量，正整数，范围 1-500，默认 10

name: show
description: 获取 Hacker News 项目展示 (Show HN). Returns HN posts where users showcase their projects and products. Each result includes the project name, url, points, and comment count. For Q&A discussions, use ask. For job postings, use jobs. For product launches, use launch.

limit.description: 返回文章数量，正整数，范围 1-500，默认 10

name: jobs
description: 获取 Hacker News 招聘信息 (Jobs). Returns HN posts containing job opportunities. Each result includes the job title, company, url, points, and comment count. For Q&A discussions, use ask. For project showcases, use show. For product launches, use launch.

limit.description: 返回文章数量，正整数，范围 1-500，默认 10

name: launch
description: 获取 Hacker News 产品发布 (Launch HN). Returns HN posts announcing newly launched products and projects. Each result includes the product name, url, points, and comment count. For project showcases, use show. For Q&A discussions, use ask. For job postings, use jobs.

limit.description: 返回文章数量，正整数，范围 1-500，默认 10

name: search
description: 在 Hacker News 搜索关键词. Searches HN archives via Algolia HN Search API and returns matching articles. Each result includes title, url, points, comment count, and submission timestamp. For browsing specific categories without keywords, use the dedicated tools: top, new, best, ask, show, jobs, launch.

query.description: 搜索关键词，字符串，必填
